msk.serverlesscluster.sasl.CfnAbout: Details for client authentication using SASL. To turn on SASL, you must also turn on `EncryptionInTransit` by setting `inCluster` to true. You must set `clientBroker` to either `TLS` or `TLS_PLAINTEXT`. If you choose `TLS_PLAINTEXT`, then you must also set `unauthenticated` to true.
